debug_info.goal:
x : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird
fond_Kx :
  EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K
      (EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x) =
    EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x
⊢ EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x = x

failed_attempts:
have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      have h2 : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h3 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ K = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h2]
      have h4 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ K = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) K
      rw [h4] at h3
      exact h3

have h : K ◁ x = x := kestrel_left_cancellation x (K ◁ x) (Eq.symm fond_Kx)
      exact h

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h, ← fond_Kx]
      exact K.call (K ◁ x) K

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h, ← fond_Kx]
      exact K.call (K ◁ x) K

have h := kestrel_left_cancellation (K ◁ x) x fond_Kx
      rw [K.call] at h
      exact h

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      rw [h] at h2
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      rw [fond_Kx] at h1
      rw [h2] at h1
      exact h1

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [fond_Kx] at h
      exact h

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ K) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by rw [K.call]
      exact K.call K x

have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      rw [fond_Kx] at h1
      rw [h2] at h1
      exact h1

have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      rw [fond_Kx] at h1
      have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      rw [h2] at h1
      exact h1

have h1 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      have h2 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      rw [fond_Kx] at h2
      rw [h1] at h2
      exact h2

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ K) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by rw [K.call]
      exact K.call K x

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ K) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by rw [K.call]
      exact K.call K x

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      have h2 : (K ◁ K) ◁ x = K ◁ x := by rw [K.call]
      exact K.call K x

have h : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := K.call x K
      rw [← h]
      exact congrArg (· ◁ K) fond_Kx
successful_attempts:
have h1 : (K ◁ (K ◁ x)) ◁ x = K ◁ x := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      rw [fond_Kx] at h1
      exact h1.symm.trans h2

have h : K ◁ (K ◁ x) = K ◁ x := fond_Kx
      exact kestrel_left_cancellation (K ◁ x) x h
